mapper.select: SELECT a.id, a.usercode, a.longitude, a.latitude, a.create_time, b.username, b.ckl, b.dsl, b.hj FROM user_location a LEFT JOIN acd_ryzd b ON a.usercode = b.usercode WHERE date(a.create_time) = #{dateStr} AND (a.usercode, a.create_time) IN (SELECT usercode, MAX(create_time) FROM user_location WHERE date(create_time) = #{dateStr} GROUP BY usercode)

SELECT a.id, a.usercode, a.longitude, a.latitude, a.create_time, b.username, b.ckl, b.dsl, b.hj FROM user_location a LEFT JOIN acd_ryzd b ON a.usercode = b.usercode WHERE a.usercode = #{usercode} AND date(a.create_time) = #{dateStr} ORDER BY a.create_time ASC
